title: Rabbit's Winter Wonderland
description: A winter paradise / apocalypse! Enjoy the holidays, a winter world, and snowy / cold related mods in - the official "Rabbit's Winter Wonderland"!
body:
**This modpack includes a wide variety of things relating to a winter tone. Please enjoy the holiday, snowy, and cold themed mods and resourcepacks as this modpack was designed for the winter season of my Minecraft Server. For anyone downloading for the server, this is a necessary requirement in order to play, and for anyone else downloading, I sincerely thank you for giving this modpack a try. I worked very carefully to make this modpack run well on almost any machine (considering my server members), so I really hope that the average user will enjoy this optimized, content-filled, winter extravangazna of a modpack!**

However, please note that I will try to update this modpack regularily for my server's sake, but until the season is over the version will likely remain in Beta with the only gallery images being the ones I initially started with! So do not consider Beta as "unofficial" or a "work in progress", but instead a phase where im still adding!
